# butteraugli-gpu public API surface
# Generated by crates/zenmetrics-api/tests/public_api_doc.rs via `cargo public-api --simplified`
# (regenerated on every `cargo test`; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Underscore-prefixed features are internal and excluded from the
# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for butteraugli_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
impl core::marker::Freeze for butteraugli_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
impl core::marker::Send for butteraugli_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode

pub struct butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R: cubecl_runtime::runtime::Runtime>
impl<R: cubecl_runtime::runtime::Runtime> butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>::batch_size(&self) -> usize
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>::clear_reference(&mut self)
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>::compute_batch_with_reference(&mut self, &[u8]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<f32>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>::compute_batch_with_reference_full(&mut self, &[u8]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<butteraugli_gpu::GpuButteraugliResult>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>::dimensions(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>::has_reference(&self) -> bool
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>::new(cubecl_runtime::client::ComputeClient<R>, u32, u32, usize) -> Self
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>::params(&self) -> &butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliParams
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>::set_reference(&mut self, &[u8]) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<()>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>::set_reference_with_options(&mut self, &[u8], &butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliParams) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<()>
impl<R> core::marker::Freeze for butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>
impl<R> core::marker::Send for butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>
impl<R> core::marker::Sync for butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>
impl<R> core::marker::Unpin for butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R> where R: core::marker::Unpin
impl<R> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>

impl<R> !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliBatch<R>
pub struct butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque
impl butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::clear_reference(&mut self)
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::compute_from_linear_interleaved(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32]) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score, f64)>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::compute_from_linear_planes(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32]) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score, f64)>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::compute_handles(&mut self, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::compute_pixels(&mut self, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>

pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::compute_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>

pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::compute_with_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::dims(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::has_reference(&self) -> bool
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::new(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliParams) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::new_with_memory_mode(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliParams, butteraugli_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::pack_srgb_into_packed_u32_handle(&self, &[u8]) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle>
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliOpaque::set_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> butteraugli_gpu::Result<()>

pub struct butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliParams

pub butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliParams::intensity_target: f32
pub butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliParams::xmul: f32

pub fn butteraugli_gpu::ButteraugliParams::with_xmul(self, f32) -> Self

pub butteraugli_gpu::GpuButteraugliResult::score: f32

pub fn butteraugli_gpu::reduce_diffmap_to_score<R: cubecl_runtime::runtime::Runtime>(&cubecl_runtime::client::ComputeClient<R>, cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle, usize) -> butteraugli_gpu::GpuButteraugliResult
pub fn butteraugli_gpu::vram_cap_bytes() -> usize
pub type butteraugli_gpu::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, butteraugli_gpu::Error>
